member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Json.Converters.ImmutableDictionaryConverter`2
member.summary: Converter class to handle serialization of ImmutableDictionaries where the key is not a native .NET type. https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/standard/serialization/system-text-json-supported-collection-types?pivots=dotnet-6-0#supported-key-types
member.typeparam: The key type. If this is a native type, this converter is not necessary.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Json.Converters.ImmutableDictionaryConverter`2.Read(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonReader@,System.Type,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Reads the serialized json object and converts to the object representation.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Json.Converters.ImmutableDictionaryConverter`2.Write(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter,System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableDictionary{`0,`1},System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Writes the dictionary to serialized json format.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Json.Converters.ImmutableStackConverter
member.summary: Avoids reversing values in a Stack when serializing to JSON https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/standard/serialization/system-text-json-converters-how-to?pivots=dotnet-6-0#support-round-trip-for-stackt

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Json.Internal.GreenWriter.PrefixExpression(System.String)
member.summary: All expressions should start with = normally so we can distinguish them from strings. Forcing this on serialization in case if somebody has created the expression without =.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Internal.JsonConverters.EnumConverter`1
member.summary: Converter which allows json to be expression to object or static object.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.RetrieveMaximumRowVersionResponseConverter
member.summary: Converter for Dataverse Rowversion response that handles writes to the field as string, but parses it as a long
